title: sagina × media
intro: Sagina × media, also known as Irish moss, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high mucilage content, which makes it a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Sagina × media include soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Sagina × media can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also often used as a thickening agent in soups and desserts.
